executive_summary.situation: Day Insure operates in temporary car insurance / digital services, competing against Tempcover, Veygo, Cuvva, and GoShorty. It is currently ranked 4/5 on monthly traffic but shows stronger AI visibility than the rest of the cohort.
executive_summary.overall_position: Challenger in traffic with an opportunity to convert AI visibility and digital-service positioning into more efficient acquisition.

strengths.point: AI visibility lead in the cohort at 31.5%, giving Day Insure a discoverability edge despite lower traffic rank.
Traffic base of 307.7K monthly visits keeps Day Insure within striking distance of Tempcover and GoShorty.

opportunities.point: Search gaps around learner, hourly, and van insurance create efficient conquest space against Tempcover, Veygo, and GoShorty.
Digital-service positioning can differentiate the brand on speed, convenience, and mobile-first cover activation.

threats.point: Veygo leads traffic at 488.7K visits and can outspend in high-intent search categories.

recommendations.action: Build category landing pages for one-day, hourly, learner, and van cover terms where competitors currently own the gap.
Sharpen messaging around instant digital cover activation to separate Day Insure from quote-led comparison experiences.
Defend the AI visibility lead with stronger organization schema, citation-building, and FAQ content before larger competitors catch up.

next_steps: Create a search-led competitor conquest brief for Tempcover and Veygo.
Expand structured data and FAQ coverage on dayinsure.com.
Package mobile-first proof points for Rob's Day Insure meeting.
